## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and the reason. -->

## Type

- [ ] Feature / page
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Content / data (regenerated via the pipeline)
- [ ] Tooling / CI / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Uses the shared kit (`assets/site.css` / `assets/site.js`) rather than per-page one-offs
- [ ] `python -m py_compile scripts/*.py` passes
- [ ] `node .github/scripts/validate-site.mjs` passes
- [ ] No images, video, build zips/PDFs, or confidential docs added (see `.gitignore`)
- [ ] If data changed, it was regenerated by the pipeline (not hand-edited generated JSON)
- [ ] Verified affected pages render (hard-refresh to clear cached kit)
